use_cases: Reveals timeline content sequentially as users scroll through the page
Creates cinematic blur-to-clear and fade-in effects for content sections
Builds animated feature showcases or product timelines
Provides scroll-driven storytelling for portfolio or case study pages
Enables staggered content reveals with configurable delay timing
ai_summary: A reusable timeline animation component that triggers blur-to-clear and fade-in effects when content scrolls into view using Framer Motion's useInView hook. Supports configurable animation delays, custom variants, and flexible HTML element rendering for building scroll-driven storytelling interfaces and sequential content reveals.
